sentence: 最近楼市的价格涨了不少。
pinyin: Zuìjìn lóu shì de jiàgé zhǎng le bù shǎo.
english: Real estate market prices have gone up quite a bit recently.

meaning: to try sth out; trial; pilot scheme
sentence: 新政策先在两个城市试办。
pinyin: Xīn zhèngcè xiān zài liǎng gè chéngshì shì bàn.
english: The new policy will first be piloted in two cities.

sentence: 天文学家发现了一颗新的变星。
pinyin: Tiānwénxuéjiā fāxiàn le yī kē xīn de biàn xīng.
english: Astronomers discovered a new variable star.

sentence: 他小时候特别喜欢翻百科全书。
pinyin: Tā xiǎoshíhòu tèbié xǐhuān fān bǎikē quánshū.
english: He loved flipping through encyclopedias when he was a kid.

sentence: 她为了健康改成了吃素食。
pinyin: Tā wèile jiànkāng gǎi chéng le chī sùshí.
english: She switched to a vegetarian diet for her health.
